tasker.process_warning.title: ⚠️ Warning: Blacklisted process detected
tasker.process_warning.impact: 💡 These processes may interfere with image recognition
tasker.process_warning.recommend_1: • Close the above processes before running tasks
tasker.process_warning.note: ℹ️ The task will continue but may fail
tasker.hdr_warning.title: ⚠️ Warning: HDR or "Automatically manage color for apps" is enabled
tasker.hdr_warning.desc: 🖥️ HDR or automatic color management may distort screenshots and hurt recognition accuracy
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_1: • Windows Settings → System → Display → Turn off "HDR"
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_2: • Windows Settings → System → Display → Color profile → Turn off "Automatically manage color for apps"
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_3: • Or disable HDR in your graphics driver settings
tasker.hdr_warning.note: ℹ️ The task will continue but recognition issues may occur
tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.title: 🚨 Warning: Aspect ratio mismatch! 🚨
tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.desc: 💡 Fullscreen mode only supports 16:9 displays; in windowed mode, you can manually set the resolution to 16:9.
tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.future: 🚀 More aspect ratios will be supported in the future—stay tuned!
